response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with broad experience across web, mobile, and some high-throughput backend systems, but he does not meet the core minimum qualifications for this role. The position requires 8 years of C++ experience; his C++ exposure is limited to a ~7-month stint at National Instruments and a thesis project. His large-scale infrastructure experience (DLang microservices handling millions of requests/sec) is real but relatively brief, and he lacks demonstrated cloud compute platform ownership or formal technical-leadership experience mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Real high-throughput, low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, open-source authorship, and community teaching/mentoring
Broad polyglot versatility (TypeScript, DLang, Java, C#, Node.js) with Kubernetes and AWS exposure
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ requirement — only brief professional C++ experience
Career centered on web/full-stack product work, not cloud compute platforms or storage/hardware architecture
No formal technical-lead role leading platform strategy or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at scale

key_factors.factor: Limited cloud platform / distributed systems depth
Strong engineering fundamentals and mentoring aptitude
